name: LND
description: LND is a Lightning Network daemon for Bitcoin. This script installs and configures LND in an LXC with optional RTL web UI, static channel backup automation, Git-backed backup sync, and Tor support.

notes.text: Wallet creation remains manual by design. Run `sudo -u lnd lncli create` after installation.
If auto-unlock is enabled, the wallet password is stored in `/data/lnd/password.txt`.
RTL is optional and becomes fully usable after the LND wallet and macaroon files exist.
